name: DC Power Transmission and Motor Drives
tagline: Rectifiers, inverters, and choppers that move or motor power when AC alone is insufficient
problem:
AC won distribution because transformers are simple, but long submarine cables look like enormous capacitors — charging current can exceed useful load. HVDC links move power as DC with converters at ends, decoupling grids that cannot synchronise. Urban traction and battery vehicles need controlled DC buses; variable-speed drives need frequency synthesis AC from fixed grid.

The obstacle is power electronics: mercury-arc valves historically, thyristors, GTOs, IGBTs, and now SiC MOSFETs — each step raises switching frequency and efficiency but demands protection against shoot-through and voltage transients.

Harmonics pollute the AC side; filters and PWM strategies are part of the civic duty of converters.
overview:
Line-commutated converters use thyristor bridges with AC grid commutation; weak grids struggle — voltage-source converters with IGBTs and PWM self-commutate and support black-start services. MMC topologies stack submodules for smooth waveforms. Motor drives rectify incoming AC, buffer on DC link, then invert to variable frequency for induction or PM motors.

Protection includes DC breakers (harder than AC zero-cross interruption), metallic return electrodes for monopolar operation, and coordination with AC-side relays. Control systems run real-time models to damp subsynchronous oscillations on series-compensated lines feeding converters.

Submarine HVDC ties land offshore wind; overhead HVDC appears where right-of-way width must shrink for the same power.

The technology is the diplomatic interface between incompatible grids — and between chemical batteries and rotating masses.

principles.name: Line versus self commutation
principles.explanation: LCC needs strong AC voltage to commutate current; VSC can form its own sinusoids with PWM.

principles.name: DC cable ampacity
principles.explanation: No skin effect at DC — conductor used more uniformly than AC at same size, helping submarine economics.

principles.name: PWM harmonic spectrum
principles.explanation: Carrier frequency and modulation index set harmonic amplitudes filtered by LCL networks.

principles.name: Four-quadrant operation
principles.explanation: Drives can motor or regenerate — braking energy returns to grid or burns in resistors if infrastructure forbids.

components.name: DC smoothing reactor
components.function: Limits fault di/dt; smooths current in LCC

components.name: Real-time controller
components.function: Executes vector control or MMC balancing

rawMaterials.name: Mica or polymer films
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Electrolytics for cost at low voltage

buildSteps.title: Load flow and dynamic studies
buildSteps.description: Model LCC versus VSC; check SCR of receiving AC system; tune PLL gains.
buildSteps.warningNote: Undamped SSR can wreck turbine shafts

buildSteps.title: Assemble valve stacks
buildSteps.description: Series connect devices with grading resistors; torque bus to spec; hi-pot each level.

buildSteps.title: Commission controls
buildSteps.description: Verify firing order; test fault ride-through scripts; black-start drills if applicable.
buildSteps.warningNote: Ground loops corrupt measurements — use fibre-isolated front ends

buildSteps.title: Energise at reduced DC voltage
buildSteps.description: Ramp power; monitor valve temperatures; scan harmonics at POC.
buildSteps.warningNote: Filter detuning from temperature shifts passbands

buildSteps.title: Handover with spares policy
buildSteps.description: Stock redundant submodule cards; train operators on alarm trees.
buildSteps.warningNote: Firmware version drift across spares causes mysterious trips

history.event: Gotland HVDC link demonstrates commercial submarine DC transmission.
Eel River back-to-back LCC ties asynchronous eastern and western North American grids.
Modular multilevel converters proliferate in offshore wind and city infeed projects.

impact:
HVDC and drives are the duct tape of modern power — stitching asynchronous regions and spinning motors at arbitrary speed without mechanical gears.

They are also harmonic pollution sources if designed without civic filters.

videos.title: HVDC converter concepts
videos.description: University lectures comparing LCC and VSC topologies.
